canonical_name: curator rule synthesis and proposal types
summary: Curator modules that define curator jobs, bounded graph/outcome/memory/projection context, proposal payload types, and rule-based synthesis/merge of edge, memory, concept, and validation proposals.
evidence: synthesis.rs contains the repeated-failure, migration, co-change, hotspot, and episodic-promotion rules plus merge logic for curator runs.
types.rs defines the curator job, context slices, budgets, and proposal payloads that synthesis emits and later review/apply paths consume.
